title: bus.hearth.session.idle v1
description: Emitted by hearth-api's session_events module when a session has been quiet for 120+ seconds. Signals the phone app to show an idle badge on the session card. Emitted exactly once per idle streak; a resumed activity event resets the latch so a future quiet period can re-emit.

idle_since.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the last detected activity before going idle.
